compiled_state.description:
## AWS review-bot signing identity (Rebar Bot) via SSM

Configure the AWS **review-bot** container to attribute its ticket writes as the Rebar Bot
identity, materializing the signing key from SSM.

**Scope correction (ADR-0047):** the auto-lander was RETIRED and DELETED (`infra/autolander/`,
`Dockerfile.autolander`, `loop.py` are gone as of the ADR-0047 migration). So this task no
longer covers the auto-lander — only the review-bot remains as an AWS ticket-event writer. The
review-bot writes only EXEMPT types (`code_review` artifacts, `review_bot/voter.py`), so
signing here is for CLEAN ATTRIBUTION (the merge-gate does not require signatures on exempt
types), not a hard must-sign; still worth doing so AWS-authored events attribute to the bot.

- The SSM SecureString `/rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key` already exists (task bffe
  provisioned it + added it to `rebar_secret_params` in `infra/terraform/ssm.tf`).
- Materialize it to a `0600` FILE at boot — a multi-line OpenSSH PEM key CANNOT go in the
  container `.env` (`fetch-secrets.sh` writes only single-line `KEY=VALUE`). Follow the
  `ci-gerrit-ssh-key` / `g2p-github-pat` materialize-to-file precedent (a dedicated boot step
  or `fetch-secrets.sh` extension writing to e.g. `/run/secrets/rebar-bot-signing-key`, 0600),
  NOT a `.env` line.
- Configure `identity.signing_key` = that file path and the bot git email
  (`joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com`) in the reviewbot container (`infra/compose`,
  `infra/Dockerfile.reviewbot`).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The reviewbot boot path materializes `/rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key` to a `0600` standalone file (materialize-to-file precedent, NOT the `.env`); the secret is never baked into the image or committed.
- [ ] The reviewbot container sets `identity.signing_key` (or `REBAR_IDENTITY_SIGNING_KEY`) to that path and its git `user.email` to `joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com`, so its writes attribute to the Rebar Bot identity (`594c-9dcf-5ad6-4e6d`).
- [ ] No auto-lander artifacts are referenced (they were deleted by ADR-0047); scope is the review-bot only.
compiled_state.title: AWS review-bot + auto-lander signing identity (Rebar Bot) via SSM
